promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 Free first remittance to Chinese Mainland with funds received in as little as 1 hour
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy zero handling fees on their first remittance to Chinese Mainland when using 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' feature through the Airstar Bank App. The transfer can be received in as little as 1 hour, making it a fast and cost-effective remittance option.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning standard interest rates
promotions.description: Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority and implemented by Airstar Bank. It provides enhanced protection against fraud losses while allowing customers to continue earning standard Savings or Time Deposit interest rates on their locked funds.

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to $800 cash rebate when booking flights with eligible airlines
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can enjoy cash rebates when booking air tickets with participating airlines (Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines) via their official Hong Kong or Macau websites. Rebate amounts vary based on transaction value.
promotions.quota: Maximum $800 cash rebate reward once per eligible Visa cardholder

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Round-the-clock instant securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers 24/7 securities transfer service with instant arrival for HKD, USD, and CNY currencies. This allows customers to manage their investment funds at any time without delays.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 📊 Trade HK stocks for as low as HK$18 and US stocks at US$1.99 per order
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers low-cost trading with HK stocks from as low as HK$18 and US stocks at just US$1.99 per order. The service includes fractional shares allowing investment with just 1 share for HK stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks.
promotions.cost: From HK$18 for HK stocks, US$1.99 for US stocks

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile phone
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers a fast mobile account opening process that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes. The service supports both Hong Kong residents and visitors physically present in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: No Account Fees or Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 💯 Zero account management fees with no minimum deposit requirements
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers accounts with no management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. This makes banking accessible to everyone regardless of their account balance.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 💱 Savings accounts with no minimum balance and support for multiple currencies
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers multi-currency savings accounts with no minimum balance requirements. Customers can save in various currencies including HKD, USD, CNY and more, providing flexibility for managing international funds.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: 🕰️ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers time deposit services with flexible tenor options and the convenience of 24/7 placement. This allows customers to start earning higher interest rates at any time that suits them.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies including HKD and CNY via FPS
promotions.description: Airstar Bank supports transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) with 24/7 instant transfer capabilities for HKD and CNY via FPS. Transfers can be made using mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 📈 Invest with just 1 HK share or as little as US$5 for US stocks
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers fractional share investing, allowing customers to start with just 1 share for HK stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks. This makes investing more accessible to customers with smaller investment budgets.
promotions.cost: Minimum investment of 1 share (HK) or US$5 (US)

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💵 Personal loans up to 12x monthly salary with 5-minute disbursement
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers personal loans with personalized APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amounts can reach up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower), with the entire process from application to disbursement potentially taking as little as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest rates vary based on credit assessment

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock digital banking access with 24-hour customer support
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides 24/7 online banking services with a 24-hour customer hotline for support at any time. This allows customers to manage their banking needs at their convenience regardless of time.

promotions.title: 24/7 FX Service
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Round-the-clock foreign exchange with real-time quotes in 11 currencies
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides 24/7 foreign exchange services with real-time quotes, instant trading, and immediate transfers. The service supports 11 currencies including HKD, USD, CNY, and others.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💰 Loan approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can apply for personal loans with personalized APRs ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amounts can be up to 12 times monthly salary or HKD1,000,000, whichever is lower.
promotions.cost: Interest rates vary based on customer profile

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 📊 Start investing with just 1 share or US$5
promotions.description: Customers can invest in HK stocks with just 1 share or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. This makes investing more accessible with a lower entry barrier.
promotions.cost: As little as 1 share for HK stocks or US$5 for US stocks

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payments
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This feature provides an additional layer of security for all payment transactions.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💳 No account management fees and no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers savings accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Multi-currency savings options are available with no account management fees.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) Up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest on deposits between HKD 200,000-800,000
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through AlipayHK App can enjoy tiered interest rates up to 2.0% p.a. Interest rates are tiered with 0.5% p.a. for the first HKD 200,000, 2.0% p.a. for amounts between HKD 200,000-800,000, and 0.001% for amounts above HKD 800,000.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers who upgrade through AlipayHK App
promotions.cost: Free (minimum deposit applies for higher interest tiers)

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first SME loan withdrawal
promotions.description: Small and medium enterprises can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 100,000 on their first withdrawal of a business loan from Ant Bank. This is a limited-time promotion to support SME financing needs.
promotions.cost: Subject to loan approval and terms

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Support for HKD, RMB and USD currencies in one account
promotions.description: Savings account upgraded to support multiple currencies including Hong Kong Dollar, Renminbi and US Dollar. Customers can experience new features through the Ant Bank APP including direct transfers from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with daily transfer limits up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Move towards zero commission for securities trading
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers securities trading with low or zero commission fees as part of their promotion to make investing more accessible. This service provides bank-grade wealth management with the ability to allocate idle funds at any time.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Early Withdrawal with Zero Penalty Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw fixed deposits early with no penalty interest
promotions.description: Customers can withdraw their entire fixed deposit before maturity without paying any penalty interest. This feature provides flexibility for accessing funds when needed while still enjoying the benefits of fixed deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Available to all fixed deposit customers
promotions.cost: Free (early withdrawal only available for the entire deposit amount, not partial withdrawals)

promotions.title: One-Stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks through a single platform
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options all in one place.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident identity)

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an investment account in as fast as 1 minute
promotions.description: Customers can open an investment account with Ant Bank in as little as 1 minute. The streamlined process requires no income proof and allows immediate use of the account after successful opening, providing convenient access to investment services.
promotions.quota: Available to all eligible customers aged 18 or above, excluding US and Canadian nationals/residents

promotions.title: Zero Fund Subscription and Redemption Fees
promotions.highlight: 💸 $0 fees for both fund subscriptions and redemptions
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy zero fees for both fund subscriptions and redemptions on Ant Bank's new investment fund platform. This limited-time promotion allows for truly $0 cost investment with no platform fees charged by Ant Bank.
promotions.quota: Available to all eligible customers during promotion period

promotions.title: Insurance Premium 100% Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💯 Get 100% of your insurance premium rebated
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy a 100% rebate on their insurance premium when purchasing eligible insurance products through Ant Bank. The bank acts as an agent for YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and offers this premium rebate as part of their insurance promotion.

promotions.title: Up to 3.6% Annual Rate Insurance Product
promotions.highlight: 📈 Insurance product offering up to 3.6% annual rate
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with returns of up to 3.6% annual rate. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and are distributed by Ant Bank as an authorized insurance agent in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: HKD $1 Minimum Fixed Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💵 Start a fixed deposit with just HKD $1
promotions.description: Customers can open a fixed deposit account with Ant Bank with a minimum deposit of just HKD $1. This low entry barrier makes fixed deposits accessible to everyone and allows customers to customize their deposit term limits.

promotions.title: Secured Savings Deposit Protection Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Extra protection for your savings against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a Secured Savings Deposit service as part of HKMA's anti-fraud measures. This service covers both Libra Savings and current savings accounts, allowing customers to lock unused deposits that cannot be transferred through any channel, reducing the risk of fraudsters immediately transferring funds out of accounts.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Securities Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a securities account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open a securities trading account with Ant Bank in as little as 3 minutes. This quick account opening service allows customers to start trading Hong Kong and US stocks quickly, with all services managed through a single app.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annual rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with annual rates of up to 3.6%. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and not Ant Bank, intended for sale in Hong Kong SAR through Ant Bank.

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 💲 Invest in funds with just HK$1
promotions.description: Customers can start investing in funds with as little as HK$1. This low entry barrier makes fund investments accessible to everyone, allowing customers to decide how much they want to invest.

promotions.title: New Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 🔄 $0 subscription and redemption fees for all funds
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform offering funds from leading companies. During this limited-time promotion, customers can enjoy zero subscription fees and zero redemption fees for all funds, providing truly zero-cost investment opportunities.

promotions.title: One-stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Access to Hong Kong and US stock markets in one platform
promotions.description: A comprehensive trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, allowing customers to access global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with No Early Withdrawal Penalties
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty for early withdrawal of time deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalties for early withdrawal. Customers can withdraw their entire time deposit before maturity without incurring any penalty fees, providing flexibility with their savings.

promotions.title: Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your deposits for enhanced security against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock idle deposits, preventing unauthorized transfers while still earning interest and maintaining deposit protection.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes
promotions.description: Quick and efficient account opening process that takes as little as 5 minutes to complete. Customers only need their HKID card and mobile number to open an account faster than it takes to prepare a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holder aged 18 or above, non-US person only

promotions.title: Small Change Investment from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start investing with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan that allows customers to start saving with just HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for their next adventure or personal milestone with minimal entry barriers.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer in HKD, CNY and USD locally
promotions.description: Instant local transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY and USD. Enables customers to conveniently make transfers in different currencies within Hong Kong from anywhere at any time.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Services
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: Seamless global remittance service allowing customers to send money worldwide directly from their smartphone. Includes real-time exchange rates for foreign currency purchases and connections to payment networks for cashless spending.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme, providing security for customer deposits. All eligible deposits are protected up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Enhanced interest rates on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: Special high-interest time deposit promotion available on Mondays for HKD deposits. This limited-time offer provides better returns on fixed-term deposits compared to standard rates.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: ➕ Elevated interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: Enhanced interest rate offer for savings accounts at Fusion Bank. This promotion provides higher than standard interest for customers' deposits in eligible savings accounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Exchange Service
promotions.highlight: 💱 Real-time currency exchange
promotions.description: Currency exchange service with real-time rates for converting between different currencies. Service is available Monday to Friday (working days) from 9:00am to 5:00pm, except during Black Rainstorm Warning or Typhoon Signal No.8 or above.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Rewards Campaign
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Special promotion for customers exchanging currencies with Fusion Bank. The campaign includes benefits for exchanging between HKD, USD, and CNY with no upper limit on transaction amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Time Deposit Bonus Interest
promotions.highlight: 💹 Extra interest on foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Preferential interest rate for time deposits in foreign currencies. The offer applies to deposits made after currency exchange transactions with no maximum limit on the deposit amount.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special exchange rates and time deposit bonus interest
promotions.description: Promotional offer for foreign currency exchange featuring bonus interest rates on time deposits. Includes currency exchange between USD, HKD, and RMB with no upper limit on transaction amount.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn with a preferential savings rate
promotions.description: liviSave offers a special savings rate for customers who deposit funds into their account. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this preferential rate, making it accessible to all customers.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers anytime with FPS
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy fast and free transfers to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). This service allows for instant money transfers without any fees, making it convenient for users to send funds quickly.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payment accepted at merchants across Hong Kong
promotions.description: livi offers a convenient QR code payment system that is accepted by merchants throughout Hong Kong. This service provides a fast, secure, and cashless payment experience for customers making purchases.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open an account 100% online without complicated documents
promotions.description: Customers can open a liviSave account completely online through the app without needing to submit complicated documents. The process is quick and easy, allowing users to start banking immediately.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy special rewards and everyday delights
promotions.description: The livi Rewards program offers customers special rewards and everyday delights. It provides benefits for regular banking activities and transactions, enhancing the overall banking experience with livi.

promotions.title: liviSave No Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 🏦 No minimum balance requirement and no fees for account
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no minimum balance requirement and no account maintenance fees. Designed to meet both spending and saving needs, this flexible account offers hassle-free banking.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💳 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: livi offers a QR Cash feature that allows users to withdraw money using QR codes. This provides a convenient alternative to traditional ATM card withdrawals.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax bills
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment to spread the payment and ease financial pressure. Earn up to HKD500 in cash rewards when completing this transaction during the promotional period.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to HKD80 off when ordering on Keeta
promotions.description: Order from Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 throughout the month. Additional benefits include surprise vouchers and welcome rewards to enhance your home party experience.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Cash Rewards and Instalments Offer
promotions.highlight: 📷 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with your Mox Credit Card to unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack, customers can receive up to 7% in total cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers can earn up to HKD2,150 cash bonus with invitation code XM1500MOX
promotions.cost: Cumulative spend requirement (specific amount not specified)

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch to win rewards worth up to HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to receive a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveals. Complete more missions to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 in SOL (Solana) + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch' with your bonus deposit
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn interest and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, receive one entry into the lucky draw. More deposits mean higher chances of winning.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD10,000 deposit for one entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Up to HKD1,380 rebates + free NowTV Pass on csl plans
promotions.description: Sign up for a new plan or renew your existing one with csl using Mox Credit Card autopay to automatically enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate. Also receive a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: csl plan subscription with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Insurance Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotional period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This additional coverage helps protect travelers from financial stress caused by unexpected events during their trips.
promotions.cost: Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving activities. This amount is sufficient for a round-trip flight to Asia.
promotions.cost: Spending and saving requirements (specific amounts not specified)

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with your Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series. This offer comes in addition to the standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride, up to HKD90 total
promotions.description: Enjoy HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month when paying with your Mox Card during the promotional period. Perfect for various travel needs including visiting family, weekend outings, or airport transfers.
promotions.quota: Limited to HKD90 total discount (9 rides at HKD10 each)

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings

promotions.description: New users of Mox FX can earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards when they start using the foreign exchange services. This promotion encourages customers to try Mox's competitive FX rates and convenient digital currency exchange features.

promotions.highlight: 💳 Earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all purchases

promotions.title: Instant Earnings on Deposits

promotions.description: Access 0% interest on eligible Instant Clear loans from Mox. This special financing option allows customers to borrow without incurring interest charges under specified conditions.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme

promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 No minimum balance required for your account

promotions.highlight: 🕗 Access full banking services anytime, day or night

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card

promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong using their ZA Card. This service eliminates ATM withdrawal fees typically charged by other banks.

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers

promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant cross-bank transfers through the Faster Payment System (FPS). Users can send and receive HKD and CNY funds instantly using just a mobile phone number, with no fees charged.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service

promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock banking services, allowing users to access their accounts and perform banking operations at any time without time constraints. Services include deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange.

promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined loan application process with approval results available in as fast as 90 seconds. Customers can apply for loans of up to HKD 1,000,000 with annualized interest rates starting as low as 1.30%.
promotions.cost: Annualized interest rate as low as 1.30%

promotions.title: Insurance Application in as Fast as 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Apply for insurance in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, ZA Bank offers a quick insurance application process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HK Stock Cash Rebate up to HKD 1,000
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected ZA Bank customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when they purchase stocks. Users can claim stock cash rebate vouchers via ZA Quest and apply them to their stock purchases to receive the cash rebate benefits.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Zero Fee SWIFT Global Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Zero ZA Bank fees for SWIFT transfers to 140+ countries
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers SWIFT transfers to over 140 countries and regions with zero fees from ZA Bank. This allows users to send money internationally without paying the usual transfer fees charged by the sending bank.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Bank customers
promotions.cost: Free from ZA Bank side (receiving banks may still charge fees)

promotions.title: ZA Bank Customer Referral Program for Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a ZA Bank account in as little as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that can be completed in as fast as 2 minutes. The fully digital process allows Hong Kong residents and visitors to open accounts quickly and conveniently via their smartphones.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit Offer for New Fund Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: Referred friends who meet deposit requirements can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD new funds time deposit interest rate booster coupon through ZA Quest, which can be combined with the base interest rate for a total of 20% p.a. Friends can receive a second coupon after meeting asset balance criteria.
promotions.quota: Referred customers who meet deposit requirements; maximum deposit amount varies by coupon (HKD 20,000 or HKD 100,000)
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 or equivalent from external account

promotions.title: New User HKD 500 Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards when opening a new ZA Bank account. Customers can complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening to receive the reward.
promotions.quota: Selected new customers only; not applicable to customers who opened accounts through referral programs or have received other new customer gifts

promotions.title: 24/7 Customer Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock customer service support
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides 24/7 customer service support to assist customers at any time. This always-available support ensures that customers can receive assistance with their banking needs regardless of the time of day.

promotions.title: Open Account in as Fast as 2 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a bank account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined digital account opening process that can be completed in as little as 2 minutes. This feature allows Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong to open an account online with zero deposit requirement.
promotions.quota: Available to all eligible Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong

promotions.title: 0 Brokerage and 0 Custody Fee Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade stocks with 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers stock trading with zero brokerage fees and zero custody fees. Platform fees are as low as USD 1.99 for US stocks and HKD 18 per transaction for Hong Kong stocks, making stock investing more accessible and cost-effective.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Bank investment account holders
promotions.cost: Platform fee only (USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction minimum)

promotions.title: New Crypto Customer Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for crypto trading during first 90 days
promotions.description: New ZA Bank customers can enjoy a $0 platform fee for cryptocurrency trading during the first 90 days after account opening. This allows new users to trade cryptocurrencies 24/7 directly with their HKD or USD deposits without paying platform fees.
promotions.cost: Free platform fee (crypto spread may still apply)

promotions.title: ZA Card with No Annual or Hidden Fees
promotions.highlight: 💳 Visa debit card with no annual fees or hidden charges
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a Visa debit card with no annual fees or hidden charges. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for contactless payments, providing a cost-effective payment solution without the recurring fees typically associated with credit cards.
promotions.quota: Available to all eligible ZA Bank customers

promotions.title: HK Stock Trading New Account Bonus
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward for opening an investment account
promotions.description: New users who open a ZA Bank investment account can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards. This promotion is specifically for users who activate Hong Kong stock trading services and is designed to encourage new investment account openings.

promotions.title: New Account HKD 2,026 Welcome Reward
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Get rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new accounts via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank account using a referral code can receive a welcome package worth HKD 2,026, including fund position rebate vouchers, stock cash rebate vouchers, currency exchange vouchers, and overseas remittance cash rebate vouchers.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Welcome Offer with Code ZAUT66
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Receive HKD 2,026 in rewards and 20% p.a. HKD time deposit
promotions.description: New customers using the invitation code ZAUT66 can enjoy rewards worth HKD 2,026 and 20% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits. The offer includes various vouchers and interest rate boost coupons.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.
